states.name: provisioning
states.description: Storage, network, Provider and runtime prerequisites are being prepared.
entry_requirements: Workspace Revision, binding and exact target execution context are fixed.

states.name: starting
states.description: Provider is starting the runtime incarnation.
entry_requirements: Materialization generation and start Attempt exist.

states.name: running
states.description: Runtime incarnation exists; Provider readiness, declared service recovery and health remain separate.
entry_requirements: Startup Receipt and runtime component references exist.

states.name: pausing
entry_requirements: Pause Activity and consistency policy are recorded.

states.name: paused
states.description: Provider acknowledges the supported pause boundary; checkpoint completeness remains separate.
entry_requirements: Pause acknowledgement and limitations are recorded.

states.name: resuming
states.description: Paused or restored incarnation is re-establishing runtime execution.
entry_requirements: Resume/restore authority and new execution context are fixed.

states.name: restoring
states.description: Checkpoint components are being restored into a new materialization generation.
entry_requirements: Compatible Restore Request/Run and new generation exist.

states.name: archiving
states.description: Runtime is being stopped/quiesced and selected state is being retained for archive/export/recovery.
entry_requirements: Archive Activity, scope and retention policy are recorded.

states.name: stopping
states.description: Runtime shutdown and cleanup are in progress.
entry_requirements: Stop Activity and treatment of Sessions/uncertain work are recorded.

states.name: stopped
states.description: Runtime incarnation no longer executes; Workspace identity persists.

states.name: destroying
states.description: Provider-specific runtime resources are being deleted after retention/reference checks.
entry_requirements: Destruction authority and retained-state policy are recorded.

states.name: destroyed
states.description: Runtime incarnation is removed; Workspace, Objects, Activities and historical Sessions remain.

states.name: failed
states.description: Exact-generation runtime failure is durable and requires reconciliation/cleanup/recovery decision.
entry_requirements: Failure evidence and uncertain work are retained.

states.name: quarantined
states.description: Runtime incarnation is isolated from ordinary work pending security/integrity/policy review.
entry_requirements: Quarantine scope and fencing are recorded.

required_preconditions: Workspace/binding/dispatch eligibility and new materialization generation are valid.
Restore Request and non-expired compatibility decision are valid; new generation is fixed.
Provider/Node or remote-service authority and required inputs exist.
Runtime incarnation exists under current generations; readiness/recovery remains separately verified.
Provider supports pause and active Operations have explicit treatment.
Resume authority and current generation/provider context are valid.
Archive/checkpoint/export scope and treatment of active work are recorded.
Stop/cleanup and Session handling are recorded.
Runtime absence/unbinding and cleanup are verified.
Retention/reference checks pass and preserved state is explicit.
Runtime resource deletion and cleanup read-back are verified.
Exact-generation failure and uncertain work are retained.
Dispatch/control/credential access is fenced and reason retained.
